name: Image
searchText: image image with optional fallback @mantine/core /core/image fallbacksrc fit onerror radius src

props.name: fallbackSrc
props.description: Image url used as a fallback if the image cannot be loaded

props.name: onError
props.description: Called when image fails to load

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius
